      private static function getQuestNpcDisplayName(param1:String) : String
      {
         var _loc2_:String = null;
         if(!param1)
         {
            return param1;
         }
         _loc2_ = QuestNpcDisplayNames[param1] as String;
         return !!_loc2_?_loc2_:param1;
      }
